claim: For all integers n >= 1, the sum of phi(d) over all positive divisors d of n equals n.
predicate: all(sum(phi(d) for d in range(1, n+1) if n % d == 0) == n for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is prime, then phi(n) = n - 1.
predicate: all((not is_prime(n)) or (phi(n) == n - 1) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is a power of 2, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n) = n.
predicate: all((n & (n - 1) != 0) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(1, n+1) if n % d == 0) == n) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is a prime power p^k, then phi(n) = n - n/p.
predicate: all((len([p for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0 and all(n % (p**m) == 0 for m in range(2, int(math.log(n, p)) + 2))]) == 0) or (phi(n) == n - n // min(p for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0)) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is odd, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n) = n.
predicate: all((n % 2 == 0) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(1, n+1) if n % d == 0) == n) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is the product of two distinct primes p and q, then phi(n) = (p-1)(q-1).
predicate: all((len([p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0 and is_prime(n // p) and n // p != p]) == 0) or (phi(n) == (min(p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0) - 1) * (n // min(p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0) - 1)) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is semiprime (product of two primes, not necessarily distinct), then phi(n) = n - p - q + 1 where p and q are the prime factors of n.
predicate: all((len([p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0 and (is_prime(n // p))]) == 0) or (phi(n) == n - min(p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0) - n // min(p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0) + 1) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is square-free, then phi(n) = n * product(1 - 1/p for p prime dividing n).
predicate: all((any(vp(n, p) >= 2 for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0)) or (phi(n) == n * round(math.prod(1 - 1/p for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0), 10)) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is the product of k distinct primes, then phi(n) = n * product(1 - 1/p_i for p_i dividing n).
predicate: all((len([p for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0]) != len([p for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0 and vp(n, p) == 1])) or (phi(n) == n * round(math.prod(1 - 1/p for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0), 10)) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is even, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d even) = n/2.
predicate: all((n % 2 != 0) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(2, n+1, 2) if n % d == 0) == n // 2) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is divisible by 4, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d divisible by 4) = n/4.
predicate: all((n % 4 != 0) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(4, n+1, 4) if n % d == 0) == n // 4) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is odd and square-free, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d square-free) = n.
predicate: all((n % 2 == 0) or any(vp(n, p) >= 2 for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(1, n+1) if n % d == 0 and all(vp(d, p) <= 1 for p in range(2, d+1) if is_prime(p) and d % p == 0)) == n) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is prime, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d != 1) = n - 1.
predicate: all((not is_prime(n)) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(2, n+1) if n % d == 0) == n - 1) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is a power of a prime p, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d != 1) = n - n/p.
predicate: all((len([p for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0 and all(n % (p**m) == 0 for m in range(2, int(math.log(n, p)) + 2))]) == 0) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(2, n+1) if n % d == 0) == n - n // min(p for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0)) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is the product of two distinct primes p and q, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d != 1, p, q) = n - p - q + 1.
predicate: all((len([p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0 and is_prime(n // p) and n // p != p]) == 0) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(2, n+1) if n % d == 0 and d != min(p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0) and d != n // min(p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0)) == n - min(p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0) - n // min(p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0) + 1) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is semiprime, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d not prime) = n - p - q + 1 where p and q are the prime factors of n.
predicate: all((len([p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0 and (is_prime(n // p))]) == 0) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(2, n+1) if n % d == 0 and not is_prime(d)) == n - min(p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0) - n // min(p for p in range(2, n) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0) + 1) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is square-free, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d square-free) = n.
predicate: all((any(vp(n, p) >= 2 for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0)) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(1, n+1) if n % d == 0 and all(vp(d, p) <= 1 for p in range(2, d+1) if is_prime(p) and d % p == 0)) == n) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is the product of k distinct primes, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d square-free) = n.
predicate: all((len([p for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0]) != len([p for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0 and vp(n, p) == 1])) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(1, n+1) if n % d == 0 and all(vp(d, p) <= 1 for p in range(2, d+1) if is_prime(p) and d % p == 0)) == n) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is even, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d odd) = n/2.
predicate: all((n % 2 != 0) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(1, n+1, 2) if n % d == 0) == n // 2) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is divisible by 4, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d not divisible by 4) = 3n/4.
predicate: all((n % 4 != 0) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(1, n+1) if n % d == 0 and d % 4 != 0) == 3 * n // 4) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is odd and square-free, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d not square-free) = 0.
predicate: all((n % 2 == 0) or any(vp(n, p) >= 2 for p in range(2, n+1) if is_prime(p) and n % p == 0) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(1, n+1) if n % d == 0 and any(vp(d, p) >= 2 for p in range(2, d+1) if is_prime(p) and d % p == 0)) == 0) for n in range(1, 501))

claim: For all n >= 1, if n is prime, then sum(phi(d) for d dividing n and d != n) = n - 1.
predicate: all((not is_prime(n)) or (sum(phi(d) for d in range(1, n) if n % d == 0) == n - 1) for n in range(1, 501))
